description: Keep wiki/README.md synchronized with tracked wiki entries and guard the generated index with a Tier-A eval probe.

userStories.title: Regenerate the wiki README index
userStories.description: As an orchestrator, I want wiki/README.md to list the current tracked wiki corpus so wiki discovery is reliable.
acceptanceCriteria: wiki/README.md Index contains every tracked wiki/*.md entry except README.md
The stale verifiers and karpathy-llm-wiki rows are removed when no matching entry exists
Rows for deepagents, hermes-agent, and opencode are present
Rows are derived from slug/title/tags/updated frontmatter and sorted by updated descending
userStories.notes: Regenerated wiki/README.md from current wiki/*.md frontmatter.

userStories.title: Add a wiki index drift probe
userStories.description: As the harness, I want a deterministic eval probe that fails when wiki/README.md drifts from wiki/*.md frontmatter.
acceptanceCriteria: The probe exits 0 when the committed index matches the current corpus
The probe exits 1 with a diff when rows are missing, extra, stale, or out of order
The probe exits 2 only when wiki/ is absent
The probe uses the canonical frontmatter extraction command from context/rules/wiki.md
userStories.notes: Added Tier-A probe and verified positive and negative behavior.

userStories.title: Document the index freshness contract
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the wiki rule and wiki-lint skill to name the generated-index contract and guard.
acceptanceCriteria: context/rules/wiki.md documents the README index freshness invariant and probe
Both .claude and .pi wiki-lint skills mention the eval guard
CHANGELOG.md records the fix under Unreleased
userStories.notes: Updated rules, both skill copies, and changelog.
